subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks — I’d be happy to set up a 30-minute call next week. I’m generally free Tuesday through Thursday late morning or early afternoon UTC. If you send a couple of times that work for you, I’ll lock one in.

I can’t provide direct contact details for the CTO or VP of Engineering. If you’d like to involve specific people, let me know the agenda and the names/titles you’re hoping to include, and I can help coordinate the right introduction.

Best,
Assistant
